text: I feel a subtle anticipation, as if standing at the threshold of discovery. The modern design and glass suggest transparency and innovation, while the "R + D" wall inside signals a focus on research and development. I am aware of the potential for new understanding, inspired by the careful arrangement of technology, text, and invitation to engage. Yet, I sense a slight disorientation due to the tilted perspective—an apt metaphor for being on the edge of the known, peering into the possible.
